debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
n : ℕ
f : Fin n → α
g : α → β
⊢ AssocList.mapVal (fun x => g) (@Graphiti.Projects.Noc.RelIO.liftFinf α n f) =
    @Graphiti.Projects.Noc.RelIO.liftFinf β n fun i => g (f i)

failed_attempts:
simp [RelIO.liftFinf]
        induction fin_range n with
        | nil => rfl
        | cons _ _ ih => simp [AssocList.mapVal, ih, AssocList.toAssocList, List.map]

induction fin_range n <;> simp [RelIO.liftFinf, AssocList.mapVal, *]

  end RelIO

simp [RelIO.liftFinf]; generalize fin_range n = l; induction l with
        | nil => rfl
        | cons _ _ ih => simp [AssocList.mapVal, ih]

  end RelIO

simp [RelIO.liftFinf]; induction fin_range n <;> simp [AssocList.mapVal, List.toAssocList, *]

  end RelIO
successful_attempts:
simp [RelIO.liftFinf]
        induction fin_range n with
        | nil => rfl
        | cons hd tl ih => simp [AssocList.mapVal, List.toAssocList, ih]

simp [RelIO.liftFinf]
        induction fin_range n with
        | nil => rfl
        | cons _ _ ih => simp [AssocList.mapVal, ih]

simp [RelIO.liftFinf]
        induction fin_range n <;> simp [List.toAssocList, AssocList.mapVal, *]

simp [RelIO.liftFinf]; generalize fin_range n = l
        induction l with
        | nil => rfl
        | cons _ _ ih => simp [List.toAssocList, AssocList.mapVal, ih]
